turns.svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#f7fbff"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#eef2f7"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="box" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#4b5563"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#111827"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="paper" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#ffffff"/>
      <stop offset="1" stop-color="#dbeafe"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>

  <rect width="512" height="512" fill="url(#bg)"/>

  <!-- subtle ground shadow -->
  <ellipse cx="256" cy="432" rx="170" ry="28" fill="#0f172a" opacity="0.08"/>

  <!-- People/crowd silhouettes -->
  <g opacity="0.95">
    <!-- left person -->
    <g transform="translate(120,190)">
      <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="26" fill="#1f2937"/>
      <path d="M-44,84 C-35,40 -14,22 0,22 C14,22 35,40 44,84 Z" fill="#334155"/>
    </g>
    <!-- center person -->
    <g transform="translate(256,160)">
      <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="30" fill="#111827"/>
      <path d="M-52,96 C-41,45 -17,22 0,22 C17,22 41,45 52,96 Z" fill="#3b4252"/>
    </g>
    <!-- right person -->
    <g transform="translate(392,190)">
      <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="26" fill="#1f2937"/>
      <path d="M-44,84 C-35,40 -14,22 0,22 C14,22 35,40 44,84 Z" fill="#334155"/>
    </g>
  </g>

  <!-- Ballot box -->
  <g transform="translate(96,150)">
    <!-- base -->
    <rect x="92" y="170" width="220" height="210" rx="18" fill="#0b1220" opacity="0.35"/>

    <!-- outer body -->
    <rect x="78" y="150" width="252" height="232" rx="20" fill="url(#box)"/>

    <!-- inner panel -->
    <rect x="98" y="172" width="212" height="188" rx="14" fill="#111827" opacity="0.55"/>

    <!-- slot -->
    <g>
      <rect x="170" y="252" width="72" height="20" rx="10" fill="#0f172a"/>
      <path d="M160 260 C170 246 342 246 352 260" fill="none" stroke="#0f172a" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.55"/>
    </g>

    <!-- top rim -->
    <rect x="66" y="132" width="276" height="30" rx="15" fill="#0f172a" opacity="0.9"/>
    <rect x="82" y="140" width="244" height="18" rx="9" fill="#111827" opacity="0.75"/>

    <!-- front highlight -->
    <path d="M106 168 C92 210 92 320 106 358" fill="none" stroke="#93c5fd" stroke-width="6" opacity="0.25"/>

    <!-- handles/edges -->
    <rect x="78" y="150" width="252" height="232" rx="20" fill="none" stroke="#e5e7eb" stroke-width="3" opacity="0.35"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Ballot papers being inserted (hands) -->
  <!-- left hand + ballot -->
  <g transform="translate(70,250)">
    <path d="M170 70 C140 62 115 48 96 28 C86 18 86 5 97 -6 C110 -20 133 -10 149 2 C165 14 191 33 206 36 C225 40 240 58 230 76 C217 99 195 82 170 70 Z" fill="#7c3aed" opacity="0.25"/>
    <path d="M165 78 C136 70 114 56 95 37 C83 25 80 10 93 -3 C107 -16 131 -8 147 3 C165 15 190 34 205 37 C223 41 240 59 231 79 C218 102 195 87 165 78 Z" fill="#111827" opacity="0.8"/>
    <path d="M188 0 C208 22 208 58 192 82 C188 88 176 93 170 87 L135 55 C128 49 136 38 142 31 C162 8 177 -8 188 0 Z" fill="url(#paper)" stroke="#93c5fd" stroke-width="3" opacity="0.95"/>
  </g>

  <!-- right hand + ballot -->
  <g transform="translate(292,250) scale(-1,1) translate(-292, -250)">
    <path d="M170 70 C140 62 115 48 96 28 C86 18 86 5 97 -6 C110 -20 133 -10 149 2 C165 14 191 33 206 36 C225 40 240 58 230 76 C217 99 195 82 170 70 Z" fill="#7c3aed" opacity="0.25"/>
    <path d="M165 78 C136 70 114 56 95 37 C83 25 80 10 93 -3 C107 -16 131 -8 147 3 C165 15 190 34 205 37 C223 41 240 59 231 79 C218 102 195 87 165 78 Z" fill="#111827" opacity="0.8"/>
    <path d="M188 0 C208 22 208 58 192 82 C188 88 176 93 170 87 L135 55 C128 49 136 38 142 31 C162 8 177 -8 188 0 Z" fill="url(#paper)" stroke="#93c5fd" stroke-width="3" opacity="0.95"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Decorative rays to suggest civic spirit -->
  <g opacity="0.35" stroke="#2563eb" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round">
    <path d="M256 64 C266 92 273 116 280 140" fill="none"/>
    <path d="M210 80 C223 108 233 132 240 156" fill="none"/>
    <path d="M302 80 C289 108 279 132 272 156" fill="none"/>
    <path d="M170 112 C188 138 202 162 212 184" fill="none"/>
    <path d="M342 112 C324 138 310 162 300 184" fill="none"/>
  </g>
</svg>

messages.content:
You are a drawing agent in a one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: svg.

Rules:
1) Draw the target word using only SVG graphics.
2) Output one complete <svg>...</svg> string.
3) Do not include text labels, letters, or numbers in the drawing.
4) Keep the SVG simple and valid. No scripts, no foreignObject.
5) Use a 512x512 canvas.

Output schema:
{ "svg": "string" }

message.reasoning:
**Designing a democracy SVG**

I'm thinking about creating a drawing to represent "democracy" using symbols only, which is quite an interesting challenge! I want to include a ballot box, maybe some flags, and hands, but without any text. I’ll center the ballot box and use simple vector shapes for the design. 

I’ll consider diverse hands offering ballots while keeping a light gray background. My goal is to create a clear SVG representation: think simplistic heads and shoulders around the box and hand icons to illustrate voting. Then, I’ll format it into a JSON string for use!

I’ll consider diverse hands offering ballots while keeping a light gray background. My goal is to create a clear SVG representation: think simplistic heads and shoulders around the box and hand icons to illustrate voting. Then, I’ll format it into a JSON string for use!

messages.content:
You are the guesser in a visual one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: guesses.

Rules:
1) You receive one JPEG image of a drawing.
2) Return exactly 20 one-word guesses in order of confidence (best guess first).
3) The order is important and will be scored by first correct position.
4) Do not repeat guesses.
5) Each guess must be EN-US one word, no spaces.
6) Avoid punctuation and numbers.

Output schema:
{ "guesses": ["string", "... exactly 20 items ..."] }

content.text: {"language":"EN-US","maxHints":20,"note":"Return 20 ordered guesses. Position 1 is the highest-confidence guess."}
